_readme: 1. Create a Google Sheet and share it (File → Share → Anyone with the link → Viewer).
2. The sheet must have a tab named exactly 'National' plus one tab per entity (e.g. 'Ahmedabad').
3. Row 1 in every tab is the header row — column names must match exactly as listed in 'columns'.
4. Copy the Sheet ID from the URL:  https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/SHEET_ID/edit
5. Paste that ID into 'sheetId' below, then save this file.
6. The sheets-loader.js script reads this file automatically — no other changes needed.

_sheetTemplate.description: Each tab (National + entity tabs) must have these 11 columns in row 1:
_sheetTemplate.statusValues: TRUE or FALSE  (Google Sheets checkbox, or type TRUE/FALSE)
